message:
fix(raptorq): E2E script v4→v5 schema grep, bench artifact environment metadata and selection contract

Three raptorq pipeline updates:

1. **E2E script (run_raptorq_e2e.sh)**: Schema grep and jq
   assertions updated from v4 to v5 to match the profile-pack
   schema bump from the previous session.

2. **Bench artifact (raptorq_track_e_gf256_bench_v1.json)**: Both
   simd_policy_ablation packets now carry explicit
   environment_metadata (target_arch, target_os, target_env,
   target_endian, target_pointer_width_bits) and
   selection_contract (profile_pack_env, dual_policy_env,
   replayable_command_bundle) fields alongside their existing
   decision metadata.  Changelog entry added for 2026-03-21
   metadata refresh.

3. **Perf invariants (tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs)**: E2E
   script coverage assertion updated to match v5 schema string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -140,6 +140,19 @@
       },
       "comparison_strategy": "same remote session, same target dir, sequential A/B execution to reduce cross-worker variance"
     },

+      "target_arch": "x86_64",
+      "target_os": "linux",
+      "target_env": "unknown",
+      "target_endian": "little",
+      "target_pointer_width_bits": 64
+    },
+    "selection_contract": {
+      "profile_pack_env": "auto",
+      "dual_policy_env": "auto",
+      "expected_architecture_class": "x86-avx2",
+      "expected_profile_pack": "x86-avx2-balanced-v1"
+    },
     "command_bundles": [
       {
         "id": "current_vs_candidate_large_balanced_addmul_window",

@@ -347,6 +373,7 @@
     "This comparator capture uses short Criterion windows for fast rehearsal and should be treated as directional evidence.",
     "Observed throughput variance indicates a full p95/p99 corpus is still required for final E5 closure.",
     "The 2026-03-02 same-session RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-006 retention result is preserved as historical comparator evidence only and is explicitly superseded for default selection by simd_policy_ablation_2026_03_04.",
-    "2026-03-04 corpus added broad RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-* coverage and selected a new x86 addmul auto window default (24576..32768, min lane 8192)."
+    "2026-03-04 corpus added broad RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-* coverage and selected a new x86 addmul auto window default (24576..32768, min lane 8192).",
+    "2026-03-21 metadata refresh: both canonical simd_policy_ablation packets now carry explicit target environment metadata and auto-selection contract fields alongside their replayable command bundles."
   ]
 }

@@ -314,7 +314,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
     echo ">>> [bundle] ${stage_id}: ${stage_desc}"
     start_s="$(date +%s)"
 
-    grep '"schema_version":"raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v4"' "$stage_log" >"$contract_log" || true
+    grep '"schema_version":"raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v5"' "$stage_log" >"$contract_log" || true
     if [[ ! -s "$contract_log" ]]; then
         status="fail"
         rc=1
@@ -323,7 +323,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
     elif ! jq -s -e '
         length >= 7 and
         all(.[];
-            .schema_version == "raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v4" and
+            .schema_version == "raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v5" and
             (.manifest_schema_version | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.profile_schema_version | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.scenario_id | type == "string" and length > 0) and
